titleStmt.title: SII 41.17: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 17. (A.R. No. 17 of 1905.) Kīḻūr, Tirukkoyilur Taluk, South Arcot District.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Vīraṭṭāṉēśvara temple.

This begins with the praśasti commencing with Tirumagaḻpōla etc. and records the gift of 96 sheep by Ayyāṟan Irāman alias Kavaṟa-śeṭṭi, of Kuṟukkaipāḍi, in Vembākkuṟṟam, a district of Jananātha-vaḷanāḍu for burning a perpetual lamp to the deity Vīrasthānam-uḍaiya-mahādēva at Tirukkōvalūr, in Kuṟukkai-kūṟṟam, a district of Jananātha-vaḷanāḍu alias Malāḍu, a subdivision of Jayaṅgoṇḍasōla-maṇḍalam alias Toṇḍai-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷ polap perunilac celviyun=taṉakke yurimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷak
kān=taḷūrccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkaināṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyu nuḷampapāṭiyun taṭikaipā
ṭiyuṅ kuṭamalai nāṭuṅ kollamuṅ kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻamaṇṭalamum Iraṭ
ṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamun tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟit taṇṭālk koṇṭu taṉṉeḻil vaḷar Ūḻiyuḷellā yā
ṇṭun toḻutakai viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ śrīkovirājarāja kecaripanma
rākiya śrīrājarāja rājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 8 Āvatu toṇṭai maṇṭala mākiya cayaṅkoṇṭa
coḻamaṇṭalattu malāṭākiya jaṉanātavaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkaik kūṟṟattut tirukkovalūr śrīvira
stāṉamuṭaiya mahādevaṟku Iññāṭṭu vempārk kūṟṟattuk kuṟukkaipāṭiyuṭaiya Ayyā
ṟaṉ Irāmaṉnāṉa kavaṟa ceṭṭi vaitta nan=tatāviḷakku 1oṉṟukku vaitta cāvā muvāp
rāṭu 9 10 6ñ cantrātittavaṟ Itu panmāheśvararakṣai
Digital edition of SII 41.17 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
